text:
Once upon a time there was a lonely little girl. Every night she dreamed of playing soccer with the stars. Nobody knew her name. Nobody knew her desires. Nobody loved her...

She loved those big, bright orange things. Those things would be hers someday. Those things were her stars. There was a big field near her house. There were no trees, just those big things hanging overhead. They glowed all night. Sometimes they blinked.

She had an owl. She liked that owl. The owl liked her. Whenever they met there was a little hoot. They knew each other.

She liked her owl.

Sometimes she slept with him. Always one eye closed.
